subject: Science
chapter: Our Home: Earth, a Unique Life Sustaining Planet
source_pdf: Our Home Earth A Unique Life Sustaining Planet.pdf

activities_projects.title: Investigating Earth's Habitable Zone
activities_projects.objective: Understand how Earth’s distance from the Sun allows life to exist
steps: Place the lamp at the center to represent the Sun
Place three balls at different distances from the lamp
Discuss which distance may allow liquid water
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze the concept of the habitable or Goldilocks zone

activities_projects.title: Planet Comparison Research
activities_projects.objective: Compare Earth with other planets in the solar system
steps: Collect data on temperature, atmosphere, and size of planets
Highlight features that make Earth suitable for life
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand why Earth is unique among planets
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of data and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Modeling the Greenhouse Effect
activities_projects.objective: Investigate how gases trap heat in Earth's atmosphere
steps: Cover one container with plastic wrap
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the greenhouse effect and its role in maintaining Earth’s temperature

activities_projects.title: Magnetic Shield Demonstration
activities_projects.objective: Understand the protective role of Earth's magnetic field
steps: Sprinkle iron filings over the paper
Relate the pattern to Earth’s magnetic protection
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect magnetic fields with planetary protection

activities_projects.title: Water Cycle Simulation
activities_projects.objective: Explore the role of water in sustaining life
steps: Pour warm water into the bowl
Cover with plastic sheet and place stone in center
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand water circulation in nature

activities_projects.title: Soil Nutrient Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how soil nutrients affect plant growth
steps: Add fertilizer to one pot only
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the importance of soil nutrients

activities_projects.title: Ecosystem Balance Investigation
steps: Explain energy flow in the system
Discuss what happens if one group disappears

activities_projects.title: Climate Change Data Study
activities_projects.objective: Investigate trends in global temperature changes
steps: Collect temperature data for the last 10–20 years

activities_projects.title: Atmosphere Layer Model
activities_projects.objective: Understand different layers of Earth’s atmosphere
steps: Draw a vertical diagram of Earth’s atmosphere
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the protective role of atmospheric layers

activities_projects.title: Environmental Protection Action Plan
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop environmental awareness and problem-solving skills
